sglang.title: [AMD][Kimi K2.5 Day 0] ROCm: route W4A16 MoE to Triton and fix packed-weight loading
sglang.author: jhinpan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As issue #17854
On ROCm, CompressedTensorsWNA16MoEMethod currently routes to Marlin kernels by default. Marlin is NVIDIA‑only, which breaks Kimi‑K2.5 (native INT4) on MI300X. This patch dispatches ROCm to Triton and fixes the weight‑loading transpose path to avoid shape mismatches.
Modifi

sglang.author: OrangeRedeng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The part of closed PR #11984.
Adding weight conversion from ND to FRACTAL_NZ speeds up the GroupedMatmul kernel
Modifications

Move transpose(1,2) from forward_npu() to process_weights_after_lo

MORI-EP is a high-performance all-to-all communication kernel for AMD GPUs. For more details, see the MORI project. MORI also provides support for CUDA Graph.

This PR introduces an ADD_TO_C mode to the fused MoE LoRA kernel, allowing the expand‑stage GEMM to accumulate directly into the final output tensor, skipping:
The separate b_intermediate_cache1 buffer allocation.
The Python‑loop output[:, :, slice] += b_intermediate_cache1[i].
The fast path is enab

vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Whisper optimizations involving CG and torch.compile are currently part of the default config with which the model is spun with vllm serve.
CI tests should reflect coverage by focusing on the compiled case, even more so that Whisper is a small model and tracing+jit take a short amount of time.
